query:
SELECT t.id, t.task_id, t.task_detail, ts.staff_id, s.name as staff_name, s.email as staff_email
FROM tasks t
LEFT JOIN task_staff ts ON t.id = ts.task_id
LEFT JOIN staff s ON ts.staff_id = s.id
WHERE t.task_id = 'TASK-gS5tOnnChN';
